title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic describes how GTM Product Manager Jared Sires built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API and Claude Code that drafts customer replies in a user's personal voice. The tool helps sales representatives reduce time spent on administrative work like documentation review and customer email handling.
